## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the [contribution guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `go vet ./...` reports no issues
- [ ] Documentation updated in `docs/` (for resource/data source changes)
- [ ] Example configuration added or updated in `examples/` (if applicable)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] No API keys, credentials, or other secrets are included in this PR
